creator: fezmilky@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #0 https://thatsnotmy-neighbor.io/)
Report the Inconsistencies: If this is part of an open-source project, consider filing a bug report or issue in the project's repository. Provide detailed information about the discrepancies and suggest corrections.

Check for Updates: It's also worth checking if there are updates or newer versions of wpa_supplicant where these issues may have been resolved.

Workarounds: For now, if you need logging capabilities, you might explore other ways to redirect output (like using shell redirection) until the issue with -f is resolved.
